claim: The Challenger broke apart 73 seconds after launch.
An O-ring seal in a solid rocket booster failed.
Cold temperatures reduced the O-ring's resilience.
Scurvy is caused by a deficiency of vitamin C.
Earth's axial tilt is about 23.4 degrees.
Photosynthesis releases nitrogen as a byproduct.
The sources state the exact launch-day air temperature in degrees.
Vitamin C deficiency primarily affects the kidneys.
Earth's distance from the Sun has no measurable effect on climate at all.
The seasons are caused mainly by Earth's changing distance from the Sun.
Antibiotics are an effective treatment for the common cold.
Water boils at a lower temperature at higher altitude.
